content.title: Uday Varmora - Site Reliability Engineer I Resume
content.summary: **Site Reliability Engineer** with **1+ year** sustaining **99.9% uptime SLA** across multi-AZ Kubernetes (EKS) clusters serving **10+ microservices** — driving incident response, **SLO monitoring**, and **~70% toil reduction** through Python/Bash automation. Hands-on with **Kubernetes (EKS), Prometheus, Grafana, Loki, Terraform, CI/CD, AWS, and Linux** — authoring runbooks and blameless post-mortems to harden production reliability.
skills: Prometheus, Grafana, Loki, Grafana Alloy, ELK Stack, Datadog, CloudWatch, AWS X-Ray
Docker, Kubernetes (EKS, OpenShift), Helm, ArgoCD, Karpenter, KEDA, Ingress-NGINX
Python, Bash/Shell, Linux (Ubuntu, Amazon Linux, RHEL), System Administration
AWS — EKS, EC2, Lambda, S3, ECR, RDS, VPC, CloudWatch; Azure (Fundamentals)
SLO/SLA monitoring, Runbooks, Post-mortems, Root-Cause Analysis, Multi-region DR
Jenkins, GitLab CI/CD, GitHub Actions, AWS CodePipeline, AWS CodeBuild, ArgoCD
Terraform, AWS CloudFormation, AWS SAM, Ansible
HashiCorp Vault, AWS Secrets Manager, Sealed Secrets, Trivy Operator, IAM, KMS

bullets: Sustained **99.9% uptime SLA** for **Kubernetes (EKS, OpenShift)** clusters serving **10+ microservices** across multi-AZ deployments — managing zero-downtime rollouts, Karpenter node autoscaling, KEDA event-driven scaling, and continuous **SLO monitoring**.

Drove **incident response and root-cause analysis** for **Linux-based production incidents** across CPU, memory, network, and container runtime; authored **blameless post-mortems and runbooks** that reduced repeat-incident frequency and accelerated on-call response readiness.

Eliminated **~70% of recurring operational toil** with **Python and Bash** automation — cluster operations, log triage, secret rotation, scheduled scaling (non-prod CronJob), and pipeline scripting; integrated SonarQube quality gates into CI/CD.

Built observability with **Prometheus, Grafana, Loki, and Grafana Alloy** — dashboards, metrics, and log pipelines across the platform's microservices; executed a zero-downtime **EKS upgrade (v1.33 → v1.34)** managing add-on compatibility and API deprecation remediation.

Provisioned multi-environment AWS infrastructure on **Linux** using **Terraform IaC** (34 reusable modules, S3 remote state, DynamoDB locking) — reducing provisioning time **80%** and configuration drift **95%** across Dev, Staging, and Production.

Built and maintained AWS infrastructure monitoring on **Linux-based environments**, configured CloudWatch dashboards, and triaged production incidents across Kubernetes workloads; authored operational runbooks for recurring issue patterns and root-cause analyses.

Wrote **Python and Bash** automation scripts to streamline deployment workflows and reduce manual operational steps — demonstrated ownership and impact, earning **full-time promotion within 5 months**.

projects.title: Cloud-Native SaaS CRM Platform — Multi-Tenant AWS / EKS Reliability & Operations
projects.tech: Terraform · AWS EKS · Docker · GitHub Actions · AWS CodeBuild · ArgoCD · Ingress-NGINX · Prometheus · Grafana · Loki
bullets: Set up and maintained monitoring with **Prometheus, Grafana, Loki, and Grafana Alloy** across the platform's microservices; executed a zero-downtime **EKS cluster upgrade (v1.33 → v1.34)** managing node group rollouts, add-on compatibility, and API deprecation remediation while sustaining **99.9% uptime**.

Built multi-region **disaster recovery strategy** using Velero (with EBS snapshot Data Mover), S3/ECR cross-region replication, and AWS Backup with cross-region vaults — achieving **RPO < 1 hour** for production workloads.

Reduced compute costs by **30% ($500+/month)** via Karpenter Spot/On-Demand diversification, KEDA off-hours scale-down, and a non-prod scheduling CronJob — preserving production availability and cluster resource utilization.

projects.title: Serverless Backend — Multi-Tenant Salon Management SaaS
projects.tech: AWS Lambda · SAM · CloudFormation · API Gateway · RDS PostgreSQL · Amazon EFS · Secrets Manager · Python
bullets: Maintained and extended a serverless build/deploy system of **6 nested SAM/CloudFormation templates** and **30+ Python Lambda functions** — handling deployments, reproducible packaging, and per-function least-privilege IAM.
Solved Lambda layer size constraints by engineering a shared **EFS-mounted Python dependency layer** across 30+ functions — eliminating packaging bottlenecks and cutting build times by **60%+**.

projects.title: Healthcare Management System — Cloud Infrastructure Prototype
projects.tech: AWS S3 · CloudFront · App Runner · ECR · Docker · GitHub Actions · GHCR · Secrets Manager · IAM
bullets: Co-built a split-hosting prototype (S3/CloudFront frontend, Dockerised App Runner backend) with a **dual-registry GHCR/ECR strategy** — demonstrating zero-downtime redeployment for client review.
Built the release workflow via **GitHub Actions** — Docker build, ECR/GHCR dual-push, S3 sync, CloudFront invalidation, and App Runner deploy — with least-privilege IAM scoping.

education.left: **B.Tech, Information Technology** — Dharmsinh Desai University, Gujarat, India  |  CGPA: 7.25 / 10

achievements: Awarded **“Student of the Year”** in Class 10 for outstanding academic performance and leadership contributions.

jd:
Role: Site Reliability Engineer - I
Company: Calix
Location: Bangalore, Karnataka
